mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PLU_USER WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PLU_USER WHERE NICKNAME = #{nickname}

SELECT USER_ID , NICKNAME , ORIGIN_PROFILE_NAME , CHANGE_PROFILE_NAME , ENROLL_DATE , MODIFY_DATE , ROLE , STATUS FROM PLU_USER LEFT JOIN PROFILE USING(USER_ID) WHERE USER_ID = #{username} AND STATUS = 'Y'
